concept: Could you craft a game where I control a character with the ability to temporarily transfer physical properties between objects? I might take the weight of a boulder and give it to a feather, take the bouncy property of rubber and apply it to metal, or take the transparency of glass and apply it to wood. Each property transfer lasts for limited time, creating urgency in puzzle-solving and combat scenarios. The protagonist discovers their ability stems from a reality-altering accident that continues to spread, threatening to cause catastrophic property exchanges throughout the world.
